---
title: "Environmental & Sustainability Statement"
---

*Last updated: 2025*

## Our Commitment to the Environment

Pine straw is a naturally renewable resource. Harvested from living pine trees without
cutting them down, pine straw is raked from the forest floor as it naturally sheds — a
process that can be repeated season after season without harming the trees or the
surrounding ecosystem.

## Why Pine Straw Is a Sustainable Choice

- **No trees are cut** — pine straw is a byproduct of natural needle shedding
- **Biodegradable** — returns nutrients to the soil as it slowly breaks down
- **Native material** — natural to the southeastern U.S. ecosystem
- **Reduces runoff** — helps retain moisture and prevent soil erosion
- **Chemical-free** — no pesticides or synthetic additives

## Our Practices

Pine Straw Distributors LLC sources from forests managed with sustainable harvesting
practices. We are committed to responsible sourcing that preserves the long-term health
of the pine forests we depend on.
